subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1915-03-19
subcodes.first_line: Ah! Thou art carrying in thy hand a rosary! With the Mohamadans it has become a habit to play with the rosary all the time.
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc., @independent investigation of truth; reality, @religious rituals minimized or eliminated
